title: Aghraz Sharah Kafia
author: Mufti Abu Owais Muhammad Yousaf Al-Qadri
notes: An Urdu explanation of Kafia that supports the study of Arabic grammar and classical Islamic texts.

title: Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum Urdu
author: Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri
notes: An Urdu biography covering the life and mission of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.

title: Manzoor-ul-Zurori Sharah Mukhtasar-ul-Qudori
author: Abu Hamza Muhammad Manzoor Nizami
notes: An Urdu commentary on Mukhtasar al-Qudori covering Hanafi jurisprudence.

title: Sharah Hidayat-un-Nahw
author: Allama Muhammad Liaqat Ali Rizvi
notes: An Urdu explanation of Hidayat-un-Nahw for understanding Arabic grammar.

title: Sharah Noor-ul-Aizah
author: Allama Muhammad Liaqat Ali Rizvi
notes: An Urdu commentary covering important topics of Hanafi jurisprudence.

title: Lonely Ummah
author: Abu Malik
notes: Explores the challenges of loneliness and disunity among Muslims while encouraging stronger faith, unity, and connection with the Islamic community.

title: Mothers Without Villains
author: Abu Malik
notes: Discusses family relationships, motherhood, and Islamic values while promoting compassion, understanding, and strong family bonds.

title: Mysteries of the Soul Expounded
author: Abu Malik
notes: Explains the nature of the human soul from an Islamic perspective and encourages spiritual growth and self-purification.

title: Contemplation
author: Abu Malik
notes: Encourages reflection upon creation, faith, and personal development through Islamic teachings.

title: Logged In, Spiritually Empty
author: Abu Malik
notes: Addresses the impact of modern digital life on faith and encourages reconnecting with Allah through Islamic spirituality.
